generated_oml:
instance DS18S20SensorA : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer with 0.5°C accuracy between -10°C and +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance DS18S20SensorB : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer with 0.5°C accuracy between -10°C and +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance DS18S20SensorC : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer with 0.5°C accuracy between -10°C and +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DS18S20SensorA, DS18S20SensorB, DS18S20SensorC
]

instance RealTimeTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature readings from all DS18S20 sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQBroker, ScipyCalibrationTool
]

instance RabbitMQBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for communication between physical sensors and virtual components"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, FaultDetectionService, StateEstimationService, OptimizationService, SupervisoryControlService
]

instance ScipyCalibrationTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy library for model calibration and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables ParameterCalibrationService, ModelBasedSimulationService
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "2-parameter thermal model (C_air, G_box) for temperature prediction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationTool
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "4-parameter thermal model (C_heater, C_air, G_heater, G_box) for temperature prediction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationTool
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of temperature for safety and optimal performance"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Detection of faults in the thermal system using sensor data and models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Estimation of system state using sensor data and models"
    DTDFVocab:provides StateEstimationInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization algorithms for system performance improvement"
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceOptimizationInsight
]

instance SupervisoryControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Supervisory control for automatic adjustment of system parameters"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlAction
]

instance ModelBasedSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model-based simulation for temperature prediction using calibrated thermal models"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight
]

instance ParameterCalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Calibration of thermal models using experimental data via Scipy non-linear least squares solver"
    DTDFVocab:provides CalibratedModelInsight
]

instance SafetyViolationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected safety violations in temperature range exceeding safe limits"
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of component faults based on sensor deviations"
]

instance StateEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated system state for control decisions"
]

instance PerformanceOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized operational parameters for energy efficiency"
]

instance TemperaturePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature values based on model simulation for operational planning"
]

instance CalibratedModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calibrated thermal model parameters for accurate simulation"
]

instance ControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of heatbed power and fan speed based on control algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "214 × 214 × 3 mm heatbed driven by 4A current via MOSFETs on PCB"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "12V/24V fan with airflow 0.02 m³/s controlled via MOSFETs and optocouplers"
]

instance StyrofoamContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "0.03 m³ styrofoam insulated container for thermal incubator"
]

instance RaspberryPi4Controller : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B used as controller for thermal incubator system"
]

instance PCBCircuit : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for controlling heatbed and fan"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply unit for heatbed and fan operations"
]

instance GitHubRepository : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Open-source repository for hardware and software specifications"
]

instance ThermalIncubatorEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains StyrofoamContainer, Heatbed, Fan, DS18S20SensorA, DS18S20SensorB, DS18S20SensorC, RaspberryPi4Controller, PCBCircuit, PowerSupply, GitHubRepository
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Controller sends commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan control) via RabbitMQ to low-level driver, which acts on MOSFETs to control heatbed and fan based on bang-bang control parameters (UL, LL, H, C)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated via RabbitMQ server; components include controller, low-level driver, and simulation models communicating with PT through message queues; data flows from PT sensors to DT models and commands from DT to PT actuators as shown in Figure 7."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase; DT integrates models post-deployment to monitor and optimize the physical system's operation, as stated in the abstract: 'once the system is deployed, the models used to build it should not be discarded. Instead, they should be integrated into a Digital Twin.'"
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model validity tested via uniform temperature experiments (Assumption 1 validation); calibration using residual error minimization; Model B better predicts thermal inertia of heatbed compared to Model A; residual error minimized via Scipy's non-linear least squares solver."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for data exchange between PT and DT; no specific protocol details beyond RabbitMQ usage, though RabbitMQ typically uses AMQP."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Hosted on Raspberry Pi 4 Model B; RabbitMQ server, controller, and low-level driver all run on the same device."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safe protocol implemented in low-level driver to maintain device safety; control parameters (UL, LL) prevent overheating; MOSFETs and optocouplers decouple control signals from high-current driving circuits."
]
